facts_preview.about_text:
Comfortable Accommodations: Chateau Kampot in Kampot offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden or pool views. Each room includes a balcony, mini-bar, and free WiFi.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a rooftop swimming pool, spa and wellness center, terrace, restaurant, and bar. Additional amenities include a fitness room, beauty services, and a 24-hour front desk.

Dining Experience: The restaurant serves international cuisine with vegetarian options. Breakfast includes continental, American, and Asian selections. Lunch is available with vegetarian options.

Local Attractions: Located 2.6 mi from Kampot Pagoda and 1.9 mi from Kampot Train Station. Nearby attractions include Teuk Chhou Rapids (6.2 mi) and Phnom Chisor (7.5 mi). Sihanouk International Airport is 52 mi away.

Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 10 for a two-person trip.

room_lines: Real guests • Real stays • Real opinions
“Room is very decent, clean and spacious. Staffs are friendly and helpful. Breakfast is very good.”
“Chateau Kampot was truly great value for the money we spent. The room was spacious, with a balcony and big windows, and the bed was so comfortable...”
New renovations large stylish rooms and a great location away from the inner town vibe noise but a 5 minute walk”
“Beautiful new hotel in a lovely refurbished building. Very friendly staff, great location in Kampot. Rooms were spacious and comfortable. Nice pool.”
Comfortable Accommodations: Chateau Kampot in Kampot offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden or pool views. Each room includes a balcony, mini-bar, and free WiFi.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a rooftop swimming pool, spa and wellness center, terrace, restaurant, and bar. Additional amenities include a fitness room, beauty services, and a 24-hour front desk.
Dining Experience: The restaurant serves international cuisine with vegetarian options. Breakfast includes continental, American, and Asian selections. Lunch is available with vegetarian options.

A damage deposit of $49 is required on arrival. This will be collected by credit card. You should be reimbursed within 14 days of check-out. Your deposit will be refunded in full by credit card, subject to an inspection of the property.
Prices for cribs and extra beds aren't included in the total price. They'll have to be paid for separately during your stay.
The number of extra beds and cribs allowed depends on the option you choose. Check your selected option for more info.
